subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! God willing, mayest thou ever cling to the blessed Lote-Tree which, before the faces of all, speaketh forth the Most Exalted Word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی انشاء الله لازال بسدره مبارکه که امام وجوه کل بکلمه علیا ناطق متمسک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @praise and encouragement, @love of God
